scheme_name: Financial Assistance to Purchase/Construct New Fishing Craft Less than 26 Feet
implementing_department: Department of Fisheries, Government of Goa
description: Subsidy scheme for construction or purchase of new fishing craft below 26 feet for inland fishing in Goa.
benefits: 50% subsidy up to ₹30,000 for General category
60% subsidy up to ₹36,000 for SC/ST/Women category
Benefit can be availed once every 7 years for replacement
eligibility: Applicant must be a traditional fisherman by birth or profession
Applicant must be a resident of Goa
Fishing canoe must be registered with Captain of Ports, Government of Goa

steps: Fill and submit application with documents
Submit at Fisheries Department or BDO/Sub-Offices
